title: better trailer pack [BTP]
description: A modpack that trully makes your game like in cinematic trailers
body:
So, I created this modpack because while watching other "looks like trailer" packs I noticed some oversights, so I decided to create my own pack containing each of the missing mods. This is how [BTP] was created
There is some photos of in game footage:
![Beautiful isn't it](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3080e1a76054499ded76085ba7de1591d87ff36e.png)
![Have you played Minecraft Story Mode season 2? If so, you probably recognize this view](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/241315c8b9a5c9ab3479d9e153c3869d24c1c959_0.webp)
[If you want to support me, go and follow](https://www.tiktok.com/@matrionpl?is_from_webapp=1&sender_device=pc)
![Guys I see diamonds there!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6aa7c700eadccb622bd37ec5b6c661ca5784d6f4_0.webp)
![cherry groove](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/301af74ea2a95b5b925241d104392fa1db05b94e.png)
